chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1019 to 1023 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.4292 of 2021. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 28.09.2021 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Muhammad Rustam, Advocate.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioners, Mr. Ovais Ali Shah submits that the issue involved in these petitions has primarily been covered in terms of the Judgment reported in PLD 2017 SC 28 in a case of Workers Welfare Fund, where the relevant provision was struck down and hence in consequence whereof the application for the refund of the amount allegedly recovered is pending adjudication. Learned counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of these petitions on the strength of reasoning assigned by the Hon'ble Supreme Court and the decision of application for the refund. None of the counsel appearing for the respondents has objected to such request. Let the application pending with the department be decided in accordance with the law and in view of the judgment referred above within six weeks. The instant petitions are disposed of in the above terms along with pending application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in all above connected petitions. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
